tasks.instruction: Browse men’s rectangular eyeglass frames, filter to options under $120 with at least 10 reviews and a rating of 4.0 or higher, sort by lowest price, then choose the second-cheapest qualifying frame in black with medium size and standard single-vision lenses, quantity 1, and add it to the cart.

tasks.instruction: Order daily disposable contact lenses for standard (non‑astigmatism) prescriptions that include free shipping and cost no more than $60 per box, set both eyes to base curve 8.6 and power −2.50, add a three‑month supply as 3 boxes per eye as a one-time purchase, and proceed to checkout.

tasks.instruction: Using the insurance and location tools, find the nearest eye clinic within 10 miles of ZIP code 94103 that accepts your vision plan and offers evening hours (after 6 PM) at least two days per week, then open the scheduling form for that location.

tasks.instruction: In the eye health library, search for “blue light glasses,” filter results to articles from the last 2 years with a blue light and screens–related tag, sort by newest first, open the top result, and use the share control to copy its article link.
